The dark string coil and pliers remain stationary on the white surface. [26-30] Hands maneuver silver scissors to cut purple paisley

[36-40] A hand picks up a white egg from a floral paper plate and wraps it in red patterned fabric, while a white cloth bundle rests on the left. [72-80] Hands manipulate and tightly twist the neck of a white fabric bundle around an internal sphere. [84-86] The view shifts to a white stovetop featuring a yellow pot with a white interior and brown rim stains resting on a black burner grate, containing clear liquid.

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] Five marbled Easter eggs rest on white painted wooden planks. Two soft pink eggs with white swirls are positioned at the far left and right, while three purple eggs with similar designs occupy the center. The scene remains completely static under bright lighting. [6-12] The view shifts to a crafting table where a hand uses silver scissors to cut white fabric. To the right, a floral paper plate with pink hibiscus designs holds four plain white eggs. Below, a coil of dark string and pliers rest on the white surface. The fabric moves slightly during cutting, while the eggs and tools stay still. [12-16] Hands use silver scissors to cut and smooth white fabric on the left. To the right, a floral plate holds four white eggs, alongside a dark string coil and pliers. [16-26] A large purple fabric with white paisley patterns replaces the white cloth. The dark string coil and pliers remain stationary on the white surface. [26-30] Hands maneuver silver scissors to cut purple paisley

[72-80] Hands manipulate and tightly twist the neck of a white fabric bundle around an internal sphere. A floral plate with three white eggs sits in the upper right, while a coil of dark string lies near the bundle. Scissors remain in the top left and pliers in the bottom right. [80-84] Hands use silver pliers to cut the dark string securing the twisted neck, trimming the excess before setting the tool down. [84-86] The view shifts to a white stovetop featuring a yellow pot with a white interior and brown rim stains resting on a black burner grate, containing clear liquid.

From [86-94], a hand pours liquid from a bottle labeled "Distilled White Vinegar" into a yellow pot with a white interior and brown rim stains sitting on a black stovetop. The hand exits, leaving the pot static on the burner from [94-100]. Finally, at [100-102], a hand lowers a bunched white fabric bundle into the liquid inside the pot.

[102-108] A hand lowers a bunched white fabric bundle into clear liquid inside a yellow pot with brown rim stains resting on a black stovetop grate, pushing it deeper to submerge. [108-110] A second white fabric-wrapped bundle is introduced into the pot. [110-114] A third bundle, distinguished by red material at the top, is lowered into the liquid alongside the two existing white bundles. [114-118] The hand presses the red-accented bundle and the others deeper into the solution, adjusting the floating cloth to ensure submersion within the stationary pot.

[118-124] A hand presses bundles into a yellow pot, submerging cloth. A yellow lid covers the pot on white handles as a blue flame ignites under the black grate on the white stove; white fabric protrudes from the lid. A hand turns the rightmost knob while the flame burns. [132-134] Hands reach into a white bowl with bundles, unwrapping a purple bundle. A yellow plate with a pink egg and copper ring sits left, near pliers and iridescent strips on the surface.
